step_by_step_thinking: Flotillin is mentioned nowhere in any of the retrieved articles. While certain proteins such as tetraspanins and integrins are noted as commonly occurring surface markers, there is no mention of flotillin specifically. Given the absence of any reference to flotillin in the literature reviewed, it cannot be confirmed whether it serves as a reliable exosomal marker. Therefore, due to insufficient supporting evidence, flotillin cannot be validated as an established exosomal marker.

While certain proteins such as tetraspanins and integrins are noted as commonly occurring surface markers, there is no mention of flotillin specifically.
